text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Passing by the outdoor stage one<n>day, I happen
to hear some lively<n>voices.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Heave, ho, heave, ho!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whoa whoa, hold the mikoshi steady!<n>Ya call
yourselves Umamusume?<n>Show me some real
Edo spirit!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Half-hearted effort won't make us<n>the heart of
the festival! Move your<n>legs in time with the
chant!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Heave, ho! Heave, ho!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, something's still missin'... But<n>what?
Gusto? Pep?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you're a trainer, right? I'm sure<n>ya got
places to be, but mind givin'<n>me a bit of advice?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
We're carryin' the mikoshi for an<n>event in the
shoppin' district.. But our<n>performance isn't
lookin' the part.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
At this rate, nobody's gonna feel the<n>Edo spirit
we're tryin' to convey. Got<n>any idea what we're
missin'?
choice_data_list: Maybe a bit more vigor in your movements?
Maybe you just need an audience?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Vigor, huh... yeah, inchin' forward in<n>this cramped
space isn't enough to<n>get in the zone.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
All righty, folks... follow my lead!<n>We're takin'
this bad boy for a spin!<n>That means you too,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Hoisting the mikoshi up, we proceed<n>throughout
the school grounds and<n>arrive at the ramp track.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Heave! Ho! Heave! Ho!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Now zat's more like it! Once we make<n>it to the
top of this hill, we can call it a<n>day.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
That being said, that's one steep hill!<n>Guess I'll
just join in on the action!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hup... Huh? Za hell?! My shoulders<n>don't reach
the pole!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Aaargh, why'd I have to be so<n>short?! Wait, if I
get up on my<n>tippy-toes... I can just about...
reach!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Despite her small stature, Inari One's<n>powerful
chants invigorate the rest of<n>us, and we
successfully carry the<n>mikoshi to the top of the
hill.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Having a crowd of spectators<n>simulate the actual
event could make<n>for good practice.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Spectators, huh. I get it. Hearin' the<n>crowd's
cheerin' is like feelin' the<n>wind push your sails.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
In that case... I'm countin' on ya,<n>Trainer! Show
me your energy and<n>cheer for us!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Quit dawdlin'! Come on, altogether<n>now! Heave,
ho! Heave, ho!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Say it like you mean it!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
That's more like it! I already feel<n>stronger! Now
try again, this time with<n>all your breath!
